title: Assistant Store Manager - Westside Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Westside Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Westside Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Westside Capital India:
Westside Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
